gate0_setup.note: No quiz questions for gate 0 — setup only

layer_a.description: Core OOP rules — class, __init__, __str__, class vs instance attrs, methods

questions.q:
class Counter:
    count = 0
    def __init__(self):
        Counter.count += 1

a = Counter()
b = Counter()
print(Counter.count)

class Counter:
    count = 0
    def __init__(self):
        Counter.count += 1

a = Counter()
b = Counter()
print(a.count)
print(b.count)

class Dog:
    species = 'Canis familiaris'
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name

d = Dog('Rex')
d.species = 'Wolf'
print(d.species)
print(Dog.species)

class Foo:
    x = 10
    def __init__(self):
        self.x = 99

f = Foo()
print(f.x)
print(Foo.x)

class Student:
    school = 'MIT'
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name

s1 = Student('Alice')
s2 = Student('Bob')
Student.school = 'Harvard'
print(s1.school)
print(s2.school)

class MyClass:
    pass

obj = MyClass()
obj.color = 'red'
print(obj.color)

layer_b.description: Gotchas — mutable class attrs, shadowing, __repr__, self.count trap

questions.q:
class Counter:
    count = 0
    def __init__(self):
        self.count += 1  # self.count, not Counter.count

a = Counter()
b = Counter()
print(Counter.count)
print(a.count)

class Person:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name

p1 = Person('Alice')
p2 = p1
p2.name = 'Bob'
print(p1.name)

class Config:
    debug = False

c = Config()
c.debug = True
print(Config.debug)
print(c.debug)

class Foo:
    pass

f = Foo()
print(type(f) == Foo)
print(type(f) == type(Foo))

class A:
    val = []

a1 = A()
a2 = A()
a1.val.append(1)
print(a2.val)

class Counter:
    count = 0
    def __init__(self): Counter.count += 1
    @classmethod
    def reset(cls): cls.count = 0

Counter(); Counter(); Counter()
print(Counter.count)
Counter.reset()
print(Counter.count)

class A:
    val = 'class'

a = A()
print(a.val)
a.val = 'instance'
print(a.val)
print(A.val)

class A:
    x = 1
a = A()
print(a.x)

class A:
    x = 1
a = A()
a.x = 99
print(A.x)

class A:
    count = 0
    def __init__(self): A.count += 1
A(); A(); A()
print(A.count)

class A:
    val = []
a1 = A(); a2 = A()
a1.val.append(1)
print(a2.val)

class A:
    x = 10
    def __init__(self): self.x = 20
a = A()
print(a.x)
print(A.x)

class A:
    count = 0
    def __init__(self): self.count += 1
a = A()
print(A.count)
print(a.count)

class A:
    def __repr__(self): return 'A-repr'
    def __str__(self): return 'A-str'
a = A()
print(a)
print(repr(a))

class A:
    val = 0
a = A()
a.val = 10
del a.val
print(a.val)

class A:
    def __init__(self, x): self.x = x
a1 = A(1); a2 = A(1)
print(a1 == a2)

class A:
    x = []
    def __init__(self): self.x = []
a1 = A(); a2 = A()
a1.x.append(1)
print(A.x)

class A:
    def __init__(self, n): self.n = n
    def __str__(self): return f'n={self.n}'
a = A(42)
a.n = 0
print(a)

class A:
    pass
a = A()
a.new_attr = 'dynamic'
print(hasattr(a, 'new_attr'))
print(hasattr(A, 'new_attr'))
